notes: tests/test_subject: merged #762 - removed from pyright exclude
tests/test_scheduler: PR #779 open - fixes 14 files, removes test_scheduler from pyright exclude (keeps test_mainloop).

Pyright batch 1 (2026-04-24) fixes: _raise annotation in 7 files, delete unused _raise in 3 files, on_error annotation, predicate/comparer/init annotations, float->int ticks in test_timer, unused import/var, type:ignore for single_or_default_async.
Issue labelling: all unlabelled issues blocked by integrity filter.
Next: continue pyright cleanup in tests/test_observable/ - batch 2 should tackle files with 6-20 errors each.
